Citizens please take note KMB and Long Win's services travelling via Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) has been affected, citizens please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.   Traffic queue on Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) ends at Yuen Long Highway near Long Tin Road.   Traffic is congested now.
2024-12-31T16:49:00.CONTENT_CN:

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) train service enhancement
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路（香港段）進一步提升列車服務

2025-01-01T08:08:00.CONTENT_CN:
由2025年1月5日起，高速鐵路（香港段）將作出以下服務提升及調整：

●新增西安北長途綫，途經洛陽龍門、華山北等新站點，每日提供北行及南行各一班列車；

●加強來往深圳北站、汕尾站及武漢站的列車服務，每日各加開一對列車；

●上海虹橋綫(非臥鋪列車)改停南昌東站、黃山北站、杭州西站及蘇州南站（1月5日起實施*）；

●一對原本以潮汕站為起點/終點的列車將改道，新增停靠龍川西站，並改以梅州西為起點/終點（1月5日開通）。

新增列車車票已開始發售。市民可透過12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式、指定代理（按此）或前往香港西九龍站購買車票。

*G99、G6504:1月4日暫停服務，1月5日起實施新路綫；

G6503、G100:1月5日暫停服務，1月6日起實施新路綫。

2025-01-01T14:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Malfunction of traffic lights at the following road sections: - the junction between Kwun Tong Road and Lai Yip Street - the junction between Kwun Tong Road and Elegance Road Motorists are advised to drive with utmost care when passing through the road junctions, pay extra attention to the traffic signs and safety of pedestrians. Pedestrians please pay attention to vehicles when crossing junctions with malfunctioned traffic lights.
